metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1841
metadata.comment:
Rationale: 7/11/2017 Pim
Fig.4: SPAR Recruits PSD-95 to F-Actin in COS cells
Fig.5: SPAR is co-localized with PSD-95 in dendritic spines, and SPAR-enlarged spines showed more intense staining for PSD-95 (Figure 5E2, arrow) compared to spines of untransfected cells (Figure 5E2, arrowhead).

Together this means that SPAR regulates recruitment of the postsynaptic scaffold.. Experimental description: Cultured hippocampal neurons were used to study the function of SIPA1L1/SPAR in regulating dendritic spine morphology.

Literal from M&M:
"Neuronal Culture, Transfection, and Immunostaining
For spine morphology studies, hippocampal primary neuronal cultures prepared from embryonic day (E) 18-19 rat embryos were plated at high density (~750 cells mm-2) (Sala et al., 2000)."

7/11/2017 Pim
- Overexpressed protein is of rat species: "Complete SPAR cDNA was obtained by PCR from a rat brain Marathon library using specific primers (GenBank accession #AF026504)."
